DEFT MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PC 1538,5 FILED

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT STAY AND PENDING SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/NP/X: BENJAMIN MERCER-GOLDEN APPEARS ON THE BEHALF OF THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/BWLIFT: 12-16-21/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL: 10000/X: NO CITE/BWNUM: 1ST/NIGHTSERV/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY AND MTS HEARINGS/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDEREDAND STAYED   TO 01-06-2022,/X: BAIL SET AT $10,000,/VD:LAST DAY OF 12-16-21 (10TH)/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/ACM/RX/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TOCOMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICEON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2:400 BLOCK OF HYDE STREET IN SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/NTW/LDPX:12-16-21/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
